_comment: Example SPAWNER_PROFILES catalogue. The app manages profiles at runtime; this file is the on-disk form (edit it directly, or let the server seed starters on first run). This IS the whole catalogue — there is no separate built-in 'default'; 'default: true' marks the profile a no-choice session uses (exactly one; if none, the first wins). Paths are HOST paths (sandbox turns drive rootless podman on the host). {{.Home}}/{{.Session}}/{{.Dir}} and {{.Vars.X}} (from SPAWNER_PROFILE_VARS, overlaid by a profile's own 'vars') are templated; an empty 'image' falls back to SPAWNER_SANDBOX_IMAGE. Adjust /home/you and the claude/codex mounts to your host layout.
